text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hmm... What an unruly machine, indeed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Please do not blame yourself for these results. I
believe luck was simply not on your side this time.
choice_data_list: Let me try one more time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Don't do it. Giving in to the impulse to try "one
more time" will lead you quickly toward the sunk
cost fallacy and ruin our plans.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, I am grateful you are so motivated to
win a plushie for me.
